label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 7

extraction.one_line_summary: STORER Michael attacked solo from 29-rider breakaway on final categorized climb, won by 40+ seconds after DSM placed three riders in early move.
tactical_patterns: DSM flooded early break with three riders including Bardet, allowing Storer to skip pulls while teammate remained in group.
Movistar attacked mid-stage despite Roglic having five-minute gap to break, forcing Jumbo-Visma domestique work.
GC riders allowed 29-man break five minutes despite Polance being virtual leader, suggesting minimal concern about his threat.

rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: crashed out on technical descent during Movistar's move, shoulder injury ended race and likely Worlds campaign
rider_signals.STORER Michael: positive: skipped breakaway turns exploiting Bardet's presence, then soloed final climb with 14-16% ramps to win convincingly
rider_signals.POLANCE Jan: neutral: held virtual red jersey most of day from break but faded on final climb, finished eight seconds shy
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: led GC favorites group home, looked strongest of podium contenders aside from Roglic on brutal stage
rider_signals.LANDER Harald: negative: dropped from favorites group on stage with 17 climbs, suggests vulnerability on extreme cumulative elevation days
rider_signals.MARTIN Guillaume: negative: distanced from GC group on category one finale despite being protected classification contender
